text:
Once upon a time, there was a girl named Clara. She loved exploring the woods next door.

One day, she saw something beautiful shining bright. A star! She went closer. There wasn’t just one.

There were thousands!

A constellation! Clara couldn’t believe her eyes. She spent evenings stargazing. Everyone wanted to know about her favorite stars. She got many photos.

One day, Clara took a selfie next to a bright star.

People loved it. She felt special.

One night, stars twinkled brighter. They wanted something special too.

They chose Clara.

She became famous. Stars twinkled beautifully together everywhere.

Maybe life wasn her favorite.

Maybe dreams were always beautiful.

You could hear stars singing.

That’s a story you’ll tell forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
